pericopes.title: Christan hijeh a hesoh genthei thoh

chapters.text: Jesu Christa Solchah Peter in, Pontus gam, Galatia gam, Cappadocia gam, Asia gam chule Bithynia gama cheng vah cheh ho,
thua nung ding le Jesu Christa thisan thekhuma um dinga Pa Pathen lung got masah dungjuiya Lhagao suhtheng kilhengdoh ho heng’ah, lungsetna le lungmon na nachunguva pung hen.
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa Pathen vahchoiyin um hen; aman amihepina chungnung dungjuiya athia kona Jesu Christa thokit vanga kinepna hing jing,
kemtheilou thengsel toi theilou gou lo dinga eihin kit leuvu ahitai; hiche gou chu nangho dinga van a kikheh khola ahi.
Chule Pathen thahat vanga nangho jong huhhinga um dinga tahsan vanga ki-ngah nahiuve; hiche huhhinga umna chu phat nununga hung kilang dinga gotsadema um ahi.
Hichea hin akhoh le, tu chomcha khat dinga patepna tintang jeh a nalunghem jeng vangun hatah-in nathanomui;
naginchat nau kipatep, meiya akipatep nunga jong mang thei sana sanga lujoa chu, Jesu Christa hung kilah teng vahchoina, choiatna chule loupina ahi theina ding ahi.
Ama chu mukha louhel’a ngailua nahiuve; tun jong ama chu mu louhel’a natahsanu ahin, sei thei louhel’in natha nomun loupina nadimui;
chule natahsanlo penu nalhagaovu huhhingna chu namu’vin ahi.
Hiche huhhingna thudol’a chu themgaohon gunchu ten a ahol’uva asuhtoh sau ahi; amaho chun nangho chunga lungsetna hung chu ding thu hi anasei masahsa u ahi.

Christa Lhagao amaho sunga uma chun, Christa thohgim dingje le nung le loupina-in ajom ding thudol aseipeh masah laiya chu, itih phat ahiloule itobang phat ahi, akopeh jiu chu suitoh goa holtoh gut’a suitohjia ahiuve.

Hiche chu amaho henga kilahdoh ahin, amaho amaho chang dinga hilouva, tua van a kona hinkisol Lhagao Thenga kona Kipana Thupha hil le hon najah uva aseiyu thil chengse lhachalea anapangjoa ahiuve; thil hitiho chu Vantilten kuna vetgun atup lheh jingu ahi.
Hijeh chun nalung kong kigah-un lang lung limgeh chan umun, Jesu Christa ahung kilah tengle nachunguva lungsetna kilhut ding ahin, hiche lungsetna a chun nakinep nau chu ngai chamkimun.
Sei ngaiya thua nung chate chon doltah-in chonun, malai na-ngol laiyuva nalung ngaichat dungjuiya nachonjiu banga chu chon louvin;
nakoupau a then bangin nangho jong nun le khan jousea thengun;
Ajeh chu, ‘Keima kathen jeh hin nangho thengun,’ tin akisun e.
Chule dat nei louhela mi jouse ama ama natoh dungjui cheh a thutan a chu Pa nasah-u ahile, hichea nachen lai sungseu hin ama chu ging lhumkeiyun;
napute napateu hinpehson chonna homkeova kona chu mangthei thil sana le dangka a kilhatdoh nahipouve;
boh beh louhel le nolna beihel kelngoinou, Christa thisan lutah a chu, kilhatdoh joa nahibouvui.
Ama chu leiset kiphudoh masanga het masahsa anahi, ahivangin phat kichai kona ama nangho dinga hung kilah ahitai;
ama vanga chu nangho athilah a kona ama kaithou le aloupisah Pathen tahsan mite nahiu ahi; hichu natahsan le nakinep nau chu Pathena aum theina ding ahi.
Nalhagao chengu nasuh thengu ahitah a, kisopi ngailut cheh dinga le thutah thua nunga sei ngaiya nahiu ahitah a ahile, lung gil’in khat le khat ki-ngailu to cheh un;
ajeh chu nangho kem mang thei chia kon hilouva, kem mang theilou chia kona Pathen thuhing le tonsot um jing pengthah nahiu ahitai,
Ajeh chu; “Mihem jouse hampa tobang ahi, Aloupina jouseu jong hampapah tobang bep ahi. Hampa agop jin Apah jong apulji tai;
Pakai thu vang Tonsot geiya um jing jeng ahi.” Najah uva kihil lhanglea Kipana Thupha chu hiche hi ahi.
Hijeh chun gitlouna jouse le duha lhep lhahna jouse chule phat lhemna le thangset, chule kiseisetna jouse pai lhauvin,
naosen soh thah bangin halpi beihel lhagao bongnoi chu ngaiyin umun, hichea chu huhhingna lama nakhantou theina dingun;
nanghon Pakai chu milungset thei ahi chu natep khah-u ahitah le;
mihem paiya um ahin, ahivangin Pathen dinga lhenthum le hinna songpi man lutah ahin, ama henga chu nahungu ahin;
nangho jong chuche song hing bangma chu lhagao in’a kisadoh nahiuvin, Jesu Christa vanga Pathen san thei doltah a lhagao longlhenna a thempua pang dinga, lhagao in khat hidoh nahitauve.
Hijeh chun Pathen lekhabua akisune; “Veuvin Zion’ah inning songpi pen, Lhentum manlu tah chu akidoi; Atahsana chu itinama jong le jachatna a chulou ding ahi,” tin.
Hichu atahsana nangho dinga man lutah ahi; atahsan louho ding vanga hiti hi ahi; “Insa hon apaiyu song chu Aninga apipena panga ahitai;“
Chule “Kipalna song le suh khelna Songpi soh a ahitai,” Amahon thu chu angai lou jeh uva kipal’a ahiuve; hiche dinga chu amaho gotsa jong ahiuve.

Ahin nangho nam lhenchom, leng thempu, vaipi theng chule ama a tum hi dinga Pathen mite nahiu ahitai; chutia chu muthima kona ama vah kidangtah sunga lut dinga nakoupau phatna chu naphondoh theina dingu ahi;
masanga chu mite hilou nahiu ahin, tu vangin Pathen mite nahitauve; hepina chang lou nahiu ahin, tu vangin hepina changa nahitauve.
Ngaitah te ho, nangho mi gama cheng le kholjin nahiuve, tia nahenguva kahungtao ahi; tahsa ngaichat thil chengsea konin kikangseuvin; hiti ho chu lhagaotoh kidou ahi.

Chule chidang namdang ho lah a nanun nakhanu phatsah-un; chutile akhang gilou tia amahon nangho nasei setnau chu amittah-in nathilpha bolu chu mu’vin tin, hiche thudol chu vettoh a aum ni le Pathen avahchoi dingu ahi.
Pakai jal’in mihem phudoh chondan thun nungun; lengpa chu mi jouse chunga vaipo ahi, tin chule
gamvaipo ho chu mi khang gilou ho chunga phula ding le mi thilpha bol ho pachatna dinga ama sol ahi, tin athu’vin nungun.
Ajeh chu nanghon thilpha bol bol’un lungthim beiho ngolna chu kasan mo hel’in lhaleu chun, hichu Pathen lunglam ahi.
Nangho chamlen chonin chonun, ahivangin hiche nachamlen nau chu gitlou khu nan nei hih-un; ahin Pathen sohte um doltah-in umjouvin.
Mi jouse jabol soh keiyun; sopitapou chu ngailu’vin; Pathen gingun, lengpa chu jabol’un.
Sohte ho, nanghon napakaite chengu gingun lang athu thu’vin nung chamkimun; apha le anun nem ho chang jeng hilouvin, lung gilou pu ho thun jong nungun.
Mi khattou Pathen ahet jeh-in thoh dol louhel thohgim hen, lunghemin thoh ham ham le hichu Pathen deilam ahin, pachat umtah ahi.
Chonset jeh-in min dengin lang thoh le chun ipi pachatna nachan ding ham? Ahin thilpha bol’in tohgimin thoh hat le chun hiche chubou Pathen deilam ahi.
Hiche dinga chu kikou nahiuve; nangho Christa kho-nung jui nahina dinguva nangho jal’a aman hesoh genthei athoh ahin, nangho dinga vettoh a jui ding akoiya adalhah ahi.
Ama chu achonsepoi, akam sunga jong duha lhep lhahna kimulou ahi;
houset achanin ahouse thuhpoi, athohgim pet jong chun koima agihsalpoi; dihtah a thutanpa khut jenga bou akingaijon ahi,
Aman eiho chonset jouse atahsa chunga apon thingleh geiyin apodohtan ahi; hichu eiho chonset lama ithiuva chonphat lama ihinna dingu ahi; ama kijepna maha a chu nangho kiboldama nahitauve.
Ajeh chu nangho kelngoi hon banga lamvaiya nahiu ahin, tu vanga hi nalhagao chingpau le nakaihoipau henga hung kile kit nahitauve.
Hiche bang chun inneipi ho jouse, na-inneipu chengu thun nungun; amaho abang khattou thua nunglou hijong leu nangho ging geh cha naumu nanun nakhanu thengsel chu amit tah a amu’va,
thua hilouva a-inneipite chengu khanthem vanga akilah lut theina dingun.
Sampheh hoi, sana khi-o, nichen ponsil got chom chom thoa polam jema kijem louvin;
lung sunga guhthim mi, nun nem le lung nem, kem theilou jem chun kijemjou hen; hichu Pathen mitvet’a man lutah ahi.
Ajeh chu malaiya numei theng Pathena kingaiho jong chu chutia chu kijema a-inneipute chengu thuthua ananunga ahiuve;
hitia chu Sarah chun Abraham chu Pakai asah a athua ananunga ahi; nangho kichase louhel’a thilpha nabol’uva ahile, ama chanute ho nahiu ahitai.

Chutobangma chun, inneipute ho, numei chu nangho sanga hatmojo belkehbai ahiu heuvin, chingtheiyin chenpiuvin, chule amaho chu hinna lungsetna nachanpiu ahijeh chun jabol’un; nataonau adallouna dingun.
Achaina a kasei ahi, nangho nabonchauvin lung khat hiuvin, kilainatto cheh un, sopi khat tah-in kingailuvin, kilungsetto themun, nun nem tah hiuvin.
Set phu lahnan house thuh hih-un; chusangin phatthei boh jouvin, ajeh chu phattheina chu lo dinga nangho kikouva nahiu ahi.
Ajeh chu; “Mi koi hile hinkho ngailut ding noma, Nikho phaho mu noma chun, Gitlouna a konin alei Chule lhep lhahna Thuseiya konin amuh Tuh tang hen;
Ama chu gitlouva konin kilehei hen, Thilpha bol hen; Chamna hol’in, Hichu nungdel peh hen.
Ajeh chu Pakai mit michonpha ho chunga chua, Ataonau ngaina a ana asun ahi; Ahin mi gilouho vang chu Amai angat jinge,” kitia ahi.
Nangho apha bollama nagunchu’va ahile koiham nabol engse dinguva?
Ahinla chonphat jal’in genthei hesoh thoh jeng jong leu chun anun nom nahiuve; amavang amaho kichatna chun kicha loujenun, lung jong lung dong hih hel’un;

chusangin nalung gil uvah Christa chu Pakai tin athengin gel jingun. Mi khattou nalung sunguva um kinepna thudol chu adonga auma ahile, amaho donbut ding chun phasademin umun; amavang lungnem le ging geh cha nadonbut dingu ahi;
se le pha hetna pha neiyun, chutile Christa a uma nachon-phatnau seise ho chun nachunguva athuseiyu jahcha thei dingu ahi.
Ajeh chu khan gitlou jeh a genthei hesoh thoh sangin Pathen lung got lam ahile khan phat jeh a nathoh gimu chu gamchenga phajo ahi.

Ajeh chu Christan jong chonsetna chengsepi jeh a chonphatah chun chonpha louho dinga eiho chengse hi Pathen kom eilhut theina dinguva khatvei hesoh genthei athoh gim ahi; ama chu tahsa a kithat, lhagaova hinga ahi;
chujongle lhagaova chea kul’a kihen lhagaoho thu agahil ahi.
Amaho chu masang laiya, Noah nikho lai sungsea Pathen lung dehatna-in anga laiya chu thua nunglou anahiuva ahi. Hiche konga chu mi themcha khat, get seh bou twiya anasoh cha a ahi.
Chule tua chuche lima kibol Baptize chan a hi tahsa nen pailhah hilouva, hetna thenga Pathen henga taona, hichun Jesu Christa thokit vanga chu nahuhhingu ahitai.
Ama vana akaltouvin Pathen jet lama aume; Vantil chengse le thuneina chule thil bol theina thahat jouse ama thu noiya uma ahi.
Chuti chu ahin, Christa chun tahsa a athoh gim jeh chun nangho jong chutobang lungput chun kivonun; ajeh chu tahsa a thohgimpa chu chonset’a kona kihongdoh hel ahi;
chuti chu ahin, nangho tahsa a naum nah lai dingu sungse chun mihem lung ngaichat lama hita louvin, Pathen lunggot lama nachonjoh dingu ahi.
Chidang namdang ho lung got lama chon le, tahsa nomsahna lung ngaichat, huh, juneh hat, ju-lhang neh, jukhop, thet umtah milim houna a lhah, tu masanga chengse chu phaset tante;
hichenga chu nanghon setna lama amaho chu nachon khompitah jehuva kidang asah uva nahouset jiu ahi.
Ahing le athi thutan dinga kigopa ang a chu amahon achon nau asuhtoa apeh cheh dingu ahi.
Hiche na dinga chu athisa ho jah san a Kipana Thupha chu kiseiya ahitai, chutia chu amaho mihem dol’a tahsa a athu u akitan a Pathen dol’a lhagaova ahinna dingu ahi.
Ahinla thil jouse hi abeina ding nikho anaitai; hiche jeh chun tao jingna dingin lungdih pu le lung limgeh chan um jingun;
imajouse chungvuma gunchutah-in khat le khat kingailut to nalah uva habol’un; ajeh chu ngailutna hin chonset tamtah akhujin ahi;
phunchel louhel’in khat le khat kilhunsah ton umun;
amitakip lungsetna thilpeh achan dungjui cheh-in, Pathen milungsetna gotchom chom tamtah gouchingpha ho bangin, khat le khat kijento jingin umun.

Thuseiya aum le ama chun Pathen thubou seiyin sei hen; chule mijenlea aum le, Pathenin apeh thahat dung juiyin jenlehen, chutia chu thil ima jousea Jesu Christa vanga Pathen vahchoiya a um theina dingin; loupina le thunei thahat tonsot geiya ama a ahi, Amen.
Ngaite ho, nangho patep dinga nalah uva meiya konga chu thil kidang nachunguva hung chua bangin kidang sa hih-un;
nangho Christa hesoh genthei thoh khompia nahiu bangtah chun kipah jouvin; chutia chu aloupina hung kilah teng le lung thanop toh goma nakipa theina dingun.
Nangho Christa min jal’a houset nachanuva ahile anun nom nahiuve; ajeh chu loupina Lhagao chule Pathen Lhagao chu nachunguva aume.
Nalah uva koiman tol tha jeh ahim, guchat jeh ahim, khan gitlou jeh ahim, midang tohna chunga khut lhajeh ahimin, hesoh genthei thoh hih hen;
Christian hijeh a hesoh genthei thohgima a um vang le ama chun jachatnan nei hih hen, ahin hiche min chun Pathen choianjo hen.
Ajeh chu Pathen insunga kipana thu kitan ding chu aphat anaitai; chule hichu eihoa akipat le Pathen Thupha thua nung louho kichaina iti tan tem?
Michonpha hon huhhinga aum ahahsat le Pathen ngaisah louho michonse hon hoiya amaiyu alahdoh dingu hitam?
Chuti ahijeh chun Pathen lunglam dol’a hesoh genthei thohgim ho chun thilpha bol bol’u hen, ama ama lhagao cheh tahsan umtah eisempau khut’ah kikhumu hen.
Chuti chu ahijeh a nalah uva upaho chengse chu naupat piu Christa thohgim hettohsah, loupina hung kilang ding chankhompi, keima kahung taova kahintil nahiuve;
nalah uva Pathen kelngoi hon um ho chu phaten chingphauvin, bollou phamo tia bollouvin, lung cham in bol’un, alam louva phatchom ngaichatna a jong hilouvin, lung gut tenin bol’un;
chule nachanho chengu chunga kipipuisah louvin, ahon chun avettoh a ajui dingujoh-in umun, kaihoiyun,
Chutile Achingpipa hung kilah tengle nanghon aloupina lal lukhuh chul theilou chu nasan dingu ahi.

Chutobangma chun khangdong ho, nangho upaho thu thun nungun; chuche kalval jong chun khat le khat kijentona dingin lungnemin kong kigah-un; ajeh chu Pathenin mihoitho ho adoudal’in mi kineosah ho lungsetna achanjin ahi.
Hijeh chun Pathen khut thahat tah noiya chun nemheo chan umun, aman aphatcha nangho nachoisang theina dingun;
nalung khamna jouseu ama chunga sep lhauvin, ajeh chu aman nakhankho dingu agel nai.
Limgeh chan umun, kihong phauvin; nakidoupiu diabol chu keipi bahkai kituma banga koi kaval lhum theidem, tia hol lea vah lea ahi;
tahsan dettah-in ama chu douvun; vannoi leiset chunga um nasopiho chengseu chunga jong chutobang thohgim chu chusoh keiya ahi chu heuvin.
Chule lungsetna jouse Pathen tonsot tonsot geiya um aloupina a dinga Christa a nakoupau tah chun chomkhat nathohgim jou tengu le nasemphat chamkimuva, naphudet soh keiyuva, nahatsah dingu ahi.
Atonsot atonsot geiyin thunei thahat chu ama a hijing hen. Amen.

Tahsantah sopi Silvanus khut’a, keiman ama hitia chu kagel ahin, nangho kitilkhouna a chule hiche hi Pathen lungset tahmong ahi, ti jong hettohsahna a chomcha kahinsut ahitai; hichea chun nangho umdet jingun,
Nakilhenpiu Babylona umnu le kachapa Mark chun nasalamui.
Ki-ngailutna a kichopton khat le khat kisalamun. Christa a um nangho nabonchauva chung’ah chamna um hen.
